source_note: Prices reflect approximate US street pricing as of early 2026. Prices fluctuate; check retailer sites for current deals.

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 1/2" Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Milwaukee's flagship cordless drill without the hammer function. At only 6.9 inches long, it is the most compact in its class, making it easy to use in tight spots like inside cabinets or between studs. The brushless motor delivers serious power for drilling through wood, metal, and plastic.
features: POWERSTATE Brushless Motor delivers up to 60% more power than competitors
AutoStop Control Mode prevents dangerous over-rotation in bind-up situations
All-metal ratcheting chuck with carbide teeth for maximum bit grip
REDLINK PLUS intelligence protects against overload, overheating, and over-discharge
Most compact drill in its class at only 6.9 inches long
products.kit_includes: Tool, (2) M18 XC 5.0Ah batteries, charger, hard case

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 1/4" Hex Impact Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Milwaukee's top-of-the-line impact driver, and the one most pros reach for. It drives screws and bolts faster than just about anything else on the market. The 4-mode drive control lets you dial back the power for delicate work like cabinet assembly, or crank it up for lag bolts into framing lumber.
features: 2,000 in-lbs of torque -- most powerful in its class
4-Mode DRIVE CONTROL for speed and power regulation
Only 4.47 inches long for access in tight spaces
Tri-LED lighting eliminates shadows in the work area
Single-handed bit insertion for fast bit changes
products.kit_includes: Tool, (2) M18 XC 5.0Ah batteries, charger, hard case

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 1/2" Hammer Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: This is Milwaukee's do-everything drill. It works as a regular drill/driver for wood and metal, but flip the mode switch and it becomes a hammer drill that can bore into concrete, brick, and block. If you are only buying one drill and might ever need to drill into masonry, this is the one to get.
features: 1,400 in-lbs of torque and 2,100 RPM -- industry's most powerful
Hammer mode delivers 33,000 BPM for drilling into concrete and masonry
AutoStop Control Mode prevents over-rotation in bind-up for safety
All-metal ratcheting chuck with carbide teeth for maximum durability
Compact 6.9 inch length fits in tight spaces
products.kit_includes: Tool, (2) M18 XC 5.0Ah batteries, charger, hard case

products.name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 2-Tool Combo Kit (Hammer Drill + Impact Driver)
products.description: The ultimate starter kit for the Milwaukee M18 ecosystem. You get both the flagship hammer drill and impact driver, plus two 5.0Ah batteries and a charger. These are the two tools you will reach for on almost every project. Buying them together saves money versus buying them separately, and you get batteries and a charger included.
features: Includes M18 FUEL Hammer Drill (2904-20) with 1,400 in-lbs torque
Includes M18 FUEL Impact Driver (2953-20) with 2,000 in-lbs torque
Two REDLITHIUM XC 5.0Ah batteries for all-day runtime
M18/M12 multi-voltage charger works with both M18 and M12 batteries
Hard-sided carrying case keeps everything organized

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR 1/2" Brushless Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: DeWalt's go-to drill/driver for anyone who does not need hammer drilling. At 6.37 inches long, it is even more compact than its predecessor, and delivers 40% more power. The 3-position pivoting LED light is a thoughtful touch that actually makes a difference when you are working in dark spaces.
features: Compact 6.37-inch design -- half an inch shorter than previous model
40% more unit watts out (UWO) than the DCD791B it replaces
3-position pivoting LED with up to 70 lumens of brightness
1/2-inch metal ratcheting chuck for secure bit retention
15-position adjustable torque control for consistent screw driving

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX ATOMIC 1/4" 3-Speed Brushless Impact Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: DeWalt's ATOMIC line is designed to be ultra-compact without sacrificing power. At under 4 inches from front to back, this impact driver can get into spaces others cannot. The 3-speed control and Precision Drive mode give you enough finesse for delicate tasks like assembling furniture, and enough muscle for driving structural screws.
features: Under 4 inches front-to-back -- one of the most compact impact drivers made
1,825 in-lbs of torque for heavy-duty fastening
3-speed motor with Precision Drive for fine control
3x LED halo light ring eliminates shadows
Weighs only 2.1 lbs bare -- minimal fatigue on long projects

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR 1/4" 3-Speed Impact Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: DeWalt's XR impact driver is the full-size counterpart to the compact ATOMIC model. It delivers the same 1,825 in-lbs of torque but with higher RPM and impacts per minute, making it slightly faster for high-volume fastening. The XR line is DeWalt's professional-grade tier, built for daily jobsite use.
features: 1,825 in-lbs torque with 3,400 RPM for fast fastening
3-speed control for matching power to the task
4,200 impacts per minute for quick screw driving
LED work light for visibility in dark spaces
Part of the XR professional-grade lineup

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX 1/2" Hammer Drill/Driver with FLEXVOLT ADVANTAGE (Tool Only)
products.description: DeWalt's most powerful hammer drill gets a big boost when paired with a FLEXVOLT battery, delivering up to 42% more power. The 3-speed transmission is unusual for a drill and gives you more control. If you already own FLEXVOLT batteries from a miter saw or circular saw, this drill unlocks extra performance from them.
features: FLEXVOLT ADVANTAGE delivers 42% more power with FLEXVOLT batteries
3-speed transmission (450/1,400/2,000 RPM) for precise speed control
Heavy-duty nitro-carburized metal chuck with carbide inserts
3-mode LED up to 20x brighter than previous generation
38,250 BPM in hammer mode for fast masonry drilling
products.kit_includes: Tool, (1) FLEXVOLT 6.0Ah battery, charger, hard case

products.name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR Hammer Drill and ATOMIC Impact Driver 2-Tool Combo Kit
products.description: DeWalt's best-value combo kit pairs the XR hammer drill with the compact ATOMIC impact driver. You get two brushless tools, two 4.0Ah batteries, a charger, and a carrying bag -- everything you need to start building in the DeWalt 20V ecosystem. At its typical sale price, this is one of the best deals in power tools.
features: XR Hammer Drill for drilling into wood, metal, and masonry
ATOMIC Impact Driver at under 4 inches for tight-space work
Two 4.0Ah batteries provide solid runtime for most projects
Both tools are brushless for longer motor life and more power
Significant savings versus buying tools and batteries separately

products.name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 1/2" Driver-Drill Kit (3.0Ah)
products.description: Makita's compact drill kit is a fan favorite among DIYers and has one of the highest customer ratings of any cordless drill. It is lighter and more compact than the heavy-duty XFD14Z, making it ideal for everyday tasks like hanging shelves, assembling furniture, and drilling pilot holes. The kit includes a fast-charging 3.0Ah battery.
features: Efficient brushless motor for up to 50% longer runtime per charge
Compact 6-5/8 inch length and only 3.8 lbs with battery
2-speed mechanical transmission (0-500 and 0-1,900 RPM)
Star Protection Computer Controls prevent overload and overheating
Kit includes 3.0Ah battery that charges in only 30 minutes
products.kit_note: This product is sold as a kit; bare tool not typically available separately in this model

products.name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 1/2" Driver-Drill (Tool Only)
products.description: Makita's heavy-duty drill/driver for serious work. With 1,250 in-lbs of torque, it competes head-to-head with Milwaukee and DeWalt flagship drills. The all-metal self-ratcheting chuck is notably high quality. This is the drill to pick if you are already invested in Makita batteries and want maximum drilling power without the hammer function.
features: 1,250 in-lbs of max torque for demanding drilling applications
All-metal 1/2-inch self-ratcheting chuck for superior bit grip
Compact 7-inch length -- 14% shorter than previous model
XPT dust and water resistance for harsh job conditions
Brushless motor for longer life, more runtime, and less heat
products.kit_includes: Tool, (1) 18V LXT 5.0Ah battery, charger, tool bag

products.name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 4-Speed 1/4" Impact Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Makita's flagship impact driver stands out with its Quick-Shift Mode, which uses electronic controls to automatically find the best speed and torque combination. The Assist Mode is especially clever -- it drives at low speed until it senses tightening, which virtually eliminates cam-out and cross-threading. A smart impact driver for people who want finesse alongside raw power.
features: Quick-Shift Mode auto-optimizes speed and torque during fastening
Assist Mode prevents cam-out and cross-threading at low speed
4-speed power selection for maximum control
Compact 4-1/2 inch length and only 1.6 lbs bare
Star Protection Computer Controls for overload and heat protection
products.kit_includes: Tool, (1) 18V LXT 5.0Ah battery, charger, tool bag

products.name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 1/2" Hammer Driver-Drill (Tool Only)
products.description: Makita's hammer drill is a well-rounded tool that handles regular drilling, driving, and hammer drilling into masonry. It is compact at only 7 inches long and feels balanced in the hand. The XPT dust and water sealing adds peace of mind on messy job sites. A solid choice if you want one drill to handle everything.
features: 1,250 in-lbs of max torque for heavy drilling and driving
31,500 BPM hammer mode for drilling into brick and block
Compact 7-inch length -- 14% shorter than previous model
All-metal 1/2-inch self-ratcheting chuck for bit grip strength
XPT dust and water resistance for increased durability
products.kit_includes: Tool, (1) 18V LXT 5.0Ah battery, charger, tool bag

products.name: Makita 18V LXT Brushless 2-Piece Combo Kit (Hammer Drill + Impact Driver, 5.0Ah)
products.description: Makita's premium combo kit pairs their flagship hammer drill and impact driver with two 5.0Ah batteries. The batteries are the fastest-charging in the industry, going from empty to full in about 45 minutes. If you like Makita's build quality and the teal color scheme, this is the way to enter the ecosystem.
features: Hammer Drill delivers 1,250 in-lbs torque with 31,500 BPM hammer mode
Impact Driver with Quick-Shift Mode and 1,590 in-lbs torque
Two 5.0Ah batteries with industry-fastest charging
Both tools feature brushless motors for 50% longer runtime
Star Protection and XPT for durability in harsh conditions

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ HP 18V Brushless 1/2" Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Ryobi's full-size brushless drill punches well above its price. At $99 for the bare tool, it delivers 750 in-lbs of torque, which is more than enough for any DIY project. It is part of the ONE+ system, meaning any of the 300+ Ryobi 18V tools and batteries work with it. The best value drill for homeowners who want a capable tool without paying pro prices.
features: 750 in-lbs of torque handles any DIY drilling and driving task
Brushless motor for 20% faster drilling and longer tool life
24-position clutch for precise torque control on screws
1/2-inch ratcheting metal chuck for secure bit grip
Compatible with all 300+ Ryobi ONE+ 18V tools
products.kit_includes: Tool, (2) 2.0Ah HIGH PERFORMANCE batteries, charger, bag

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ HP 18V Brushless Compact 1/2" Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Ryobi's compact drill is designed for light-to-medium duty work around the house -- hanging pictures, assembling furniture, drilling pilot holes. It is 30% more compact and 20% lighter than the full-size model. If you do not need to drill through heavy lumber or metal, this is plenty of drill at a price that is hard to argue with.
features: 30% more compact and 20% lighter than brushed model
Brushless motor provides 400 in-lbs of torque
Only 6.4 inches long for tight-space access
24-position clutch for precise screw driving
Part of the ONE+ system -- works with all Ryobi 18V batteries

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ HP 18V Brushless 4-Mode 1/4" Impact Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Ryobi's top-tier impact driver is a genuine surprise -- it produces 2,200 in-lbs of torque, which actually beats some professional-tier models. The 4-mode control includes an Assist mode that starts slow to prevent cam-out, then ramps up once the fastener is engaged. At $119, it is arguably the best value impact driver on the market.
features: 2,200 in-lbs of torque -- more than many pro-grade impact drivers
4-mode control including Assist Mode for precision fastening
One-handed bit release for fast and easy bit changes
4,000 IPM for quick task completion
Weighs only 2.3 lbs bare for all-day comfort
products.kit_includes: Tool, (1) 2.0Ah HIGH PERFORMANCE battery, charger, bag

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ HP 18V Brushless 1/2" Hammer Drill (Tool Only)
products.description: If you need to drill into concrete or masonry on a budget, Ryobi's HP hammer drill gets the job done. It delivers 750 in-lbs of torque and 31,000 BPM in hammer mode. It is not as powerful as Milwaukee or DeWalt hammer drills, but for the occasional anchor hole in a foundation wall or brick, it is more than capable -- and at $119, it is roughly half the price.
features: 750 in-lbs of torque with 31,000 BPM hammer mode
29% faster drilling in hammer mode vs previous model
Auxiliary handle for control during heavy-duty applications
1/2-inch ratcheting metal chuck for bit security
LED worklight illuminates the work area
products.kit_includes: Tool, (1) 4.0Ah HIGH PERFORMANCE battery, charger, bag

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ HP 18V Brushless 2-Tool Combo Kit (Hammer Drill + Impact Driver)
products.description: The best way to start with Ryobi's ONE+ HP platform. You get their top-tier hammer drill and impact driver, plus a 4.0Ah and a 2.0Ah battery, charger, and carrying bag. At $229, this is significantly cheaper than comparable Milwaukee, DeWalt, or Makita combo kits while delivering surprisingly competitive performance for DIY projects.
features: HP Hammer Drill with 750 in-lbs torque and hammer mode
HP 4-Mode Impact Driver with 2,200 in-lbs torque
Includes both a 4.0Ah and 2.0Ah HIGH PERFORMANCE battery
Both tools are brushless for longer life and more power
Compatible with all 300+ Ryobi ONE+ 18V tools and batteries

products.name: Ryobi ONE+ HP 18V Compact Brushless 2-Tool Combo Kit (Drill + Impact)
products.description: Ryobi's compact combo kit is the entry point for DIY homeowners who want two essential tools without spending a lot. The compact drill and impact driver handle everyday tasks like hanging shelves, assembling furniture, and basic home repairs. The smaller 1.5Ah batteries keep things light but may need swapping on bigger projects.
features: Compact drill with 400 in-lbs torque for everyday tasks
Compact impact driver with 1,700 in-lbs torque
Both tools are sub-compact for tight-space work
Two 1.5Ah batteries keep the kit lightweight and portable
Best entry price for a brushless 2-tool kit

milwaukee-m18.strengths: Highest torque specs, most compact designs, excellent build quality
milwaukee-m18.weaknesses: Most expensive ecosystem, tool-only pricing does not include batteries

dewalt-20v.strengths: Widest retail availability, FLEXVOLT cross-compatibility, competitive combo kit pricing
dewalt-20v.weaknesses: Multiple confusing sub-brands (ATOMIC, XR, MAX), torque specs sometimes listed in UWO instead of in-lbs

makita-18v-lxt.strengths: Fastest battery charging, excellent build quality, Smart features like Quick-Shift Mode
makita-18v-lxt.weaknesses: Slightly lower peak torque than Milwaukee, less retail presence than DeWalt

ryobi-one-plus.strengths: Best value, largest tool ecosystem (300+ tools), Home Depot exclusive means easy support
ryobi-one-plus.weaknesses: Lower torque than pro brands, Home Depot exclusive limits shopping options
